name: POSRAT sample — AWS basics
description: Minimal sample exam used as a contract smoke test for the JSON bundle format. Exercises all three question types.

questions.text: Which AWS service is best suited as a durable, scalable object store?
questions.explanation: Amazon S3 is the primary object storage service on AWS. EBS is block storage attached to EC2; EFS is a managed NFS filesystem.

questions.text: Which of the following are AWS compute services? (Pick all that apply.)
questions.explanation: EC2 runs long-lived virtual machines, Lambda runs event-driven functions, and Fargate runs containers without managing servers. S3 is storage, not compute.

questions.text: For each capability, pick the AWS service that fits best.
questions.explanation: S3 is durable object storage, EC2 provides long-running virtual machines, and Lambda runs short event-driven functions.

steps.prompt: Durable object storage for static assets
Long-running virtual machine with full OS control
